title: BillingNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-billing-server (multi-tenant AR/AP ledger). The server is Model A (observer/recorder): it publishes redacted domain events (ledger postings, reconciliation breaks, Solana anchors, provider webhook receipts, provider-connection lifecycle) as a best-effort audit/event feed on core NATS, and subscribes to inbound commands that request a provider-connection sync. Payloads must never contain secrets, raw webhook bodies, or sealed credentials.

$dd:nats.summary: Billing ledger domain-event feed + inbound sync commands.

subjects.name: BillingLedgerPostings
subjects.description: Emitted after a double-entry transaction is committed to the Postgres ledger. Carries a redacted summary (tenant, transaction id, kind, per-currency totals, posting count) so downstream services can react to ledger movement without reading the database. Default for BILLING_NATS_SUBJECT_LEDGER.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.ledger.postings

subjects.name: BillingReconciliationBreaks
subjects.description: Emitted when a reconciliation break is opened during provider sync (drift between provider-reported state and the ledger). Carries tenant, provider, break type, currency, external ref, and expected/actual minor amounts. Alert-worthy.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.reconciliation.breaks

subjects.name: BillingAnchors
subjects.description: Emitted when a Merkle root over a posting range is anchored to Solana (tamper-evidence notary). Carries tenant, anchor id, posting range/count, merkle root hex, tx signature, and slot.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.anchors

subjects.name: BillingWebhookReceipts
subjects.description: Redacted provider webhook receipt audit feed. Carries provider, external event id, event type, signature_ok, tenant/connection ids, and the payload sha256 prefix only. The raw webhook body and verification error detail are deliberately NOT published. Mirrors dd.remote.public_data.webhooks.events as an audit source, not a canonical store.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.webhooks.receipts

subjects.name: BillingConnectionEvents
subjects.description: Provider-connection lifecycle feed (created, attached/activated, synced, failed). Carries tenant, connection id, provider tag, and the lifecycle transition. No credentials.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.connections.events

subjects.name: BillingSyncCommands
subjects.description: Inbound command requesting a provider-connection sync. Payload is {tenantId, connectionId}. Queue-grouped so billing-server replicas load-balance and a given command runs on exactly one pod. Default for BILLING_NATS_SUBJECT_SYNC_COMMANDS.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.billing.commands.sync

queueGroups.name: BillingServerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Queue group shared by dd-billing-server replicas for inbound sync commands so each command is handled by exactly one pod.
